name: freelancekit
description: Free /invoice skill for freelancers — describe the work in plain English and get a clean, client-ready invoice back (HTML you can paste into an email + a Markdown copy for your records), right inside Claude Code. No API keys, no config, nothing leaves your machine. This is the free wedge of FreelanceKit; the full pack adds /proposal, /meeting, /redline, /outreach, /scopecheck and /setrate. https://freelancekit.tools
